tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All basic metabolic, renal, and glycemic parameters are within normal limits. Lipid profile shows elevated LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Microalbumin/creatinine ratio is normal, suggesting no significant renal impairment. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring cardiovascular risk factors.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
